pr.title: Non-record: Negative findings on codebook quantization, magnitude pruning, multi-token prediction, embedding factorization

output.summary: 11-layer int6 transformer with EMA/TTT/XSA tuning and zstd-22 compression, documenting broad ablations on quantization, pruning, and embedding factorization.
techniques: zstd-22 compressed artifacts keeping FP16 embedding exports off
Extensive negative findings on pruning, multi-token heads, codebook quant, and embedding SVD
